stdout:
Reddit's Dev Platform CLI Tool

VERSION
  @devvit/cli/0.13.2 linux-x64 node-v24.14.0

USAGE
  $ devvit [COMMAND]

COMMANDS
  create icons   Create a new icon set for your project
  help           Display help for devvit.
  init           Initialize a new app
  install        Install an app from the App Directory to a subreddit that you
                 moderate. Specify the version you want to install, or default
                 to @latest
  list apps      List all apps that you have published
  list installs  List all apps currently installed in the specified subreddit.
                 If no subreddit is given, defaults to listing all apps
                 installed by you
  login          Log in to Devvit via reddit.com
  logout         Log out of Devvit via reddit.com
  logs           Streams logs for an installation within a specified subreddit
  metrics        Turn CLI metrics collection on or off
  new            Initialize a new app
  playtest       Installs your app to your test subreddit and starts a playtest
                 session where a new version is installed whenever you save
                 changes to your app code, and logs are continuously streamed
  products add   Add a new product to your app
  publish        Creates a new app version, uploads it along with your source
                 for review, and then files a publish request for you app.
  settings list  List settings for your app. These settings exist at the global
                 app-scope and are available to all instances of your app.
  settings set   Create and update settings for your app. These settings will be
                 added at the global app-scope.
  uninstall      Uninstall an app from the specified subreddit
  update app     Update @devvit project dependencies to the currently installed
                 CLI's version
  upload         Upload the app to the App Directory. Uploaded apps are only
                 visible to you (the app owner) and can only be installed to a
                 small test subreddit with less than 200 subscribers
  version        Display version information about the locally installed devvit
                 CLI
  view           View details about an app version. Specify the version you
                 want, or default to @latest
  whoami         Display the currently logged in reddit.com user
